title: Delhi Heat Wave
lead: Delhi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +5.80. The city's temperature has reached critical levels.
body:
The current heat wave in Delhi has a Z-Score of +5.80, indicating a significant anomaly. 
 The city's temperature is at a critical level, with a score of 10.0/10, resulting in high CDD of 19.3 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 26% and wind speed is 6.6 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave conditions.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact on the city.
